issues.message: Description omits additional plugins bundled by the preset: @babel/plugin-proposal-decorators (enabled with TypeScript), babel-plugin-transform-react-remove-prop-types (production only), and babel-plugin-dynamic-import-node (test only).

No mention of environment-dependent behavior: preset configures different presets/plugins based on NODE_ENV/BABEL_ENV (development, production, test), e.g. targeting current Node in test, removing prop-types in production.
